results.rendered_html:
amātra a. [nāsti mātrā iyattā yasya]
1 Boundless, immeasurable.
2 Not whole or entire.
3 Not elementary.
4 Having the measure or quantity of the letter a.
— traṃ
1 Non-measure.
2 Not a measure or quantity.
— traḥ The Supreme Spirit.
